mimetypes/MimeTypes/types_map.name: types_map
mimetypes/MimeTypes/types_map.description: Tuple containing two dictionaries, mapping filename extensions to MIME types: the first dictionary is for the non-standards types and the second one is for the standard types. They are initialized by common_types and types_map.
